Gift cards that print money in November. Loyalty that brings them back in February. Promotions that don't bleed margin in May. One platform — sized for your peak, priced for your year.

The retail year, in four moments

Your calendar is our roadmap.

Every retail brand runs the same year. Every quarter has the same recurring crisis. We built the platform that solves all four — instead of bolting on a tool for each.

Q4 · NOV–DEC
Holiday gifting peak

eGifts make up 30%+ of holiday revenue. One outage and you lose a week's GMV. One ugly card design and the brand suffers.

✓
Gift Cards + Wallet Passes. Branded eGifts, scaled to BFCM, delivered to inbox + wallet in under 2 seconds.
Q1 · JAN–FEB
The returns avalanche

January refunds bleed cash and kill LTV. Standard refund-to-cash means you lose the customer too. They got disappointed and got their money back.

✓
Store Credit + Refunds-as-Credit. Offer credit + 15%, recover 64% of refund cash, keep the relationship.
Q2 · MAR–MAY
Spring re-engagement

The customers who bought a gift in December — what happens to them? Most retailers never speak to them again. That's the loyalty cohort you're leaving on the table.

✓
Loyalty Engine. Auto-enroll holiday gifters into a tiered program. Birthday rewards. Status. Habit-building challenges.
Q3 · JUN–OCT
The margin grind

Mid-year is when discounts get desperate. Site-wide 25% off attracts customers who'd have paid full price — and trains everyone to wait for the sale.

✓
ML-Personalized Promotions. Discount only the customers who need the nudge. Save 40% of promo cost; protect AOV.
Move the metrics that matter

The four KPIs every retail VP gets asked about every Monday.

Forget feature lists. Here's what 99minds does to the numbers your CEO actually tracks.

+42%
LTV uplift among customers in our loyalty program after 12 months
How. Tier-based status drives 3.2× repeat purchase. Birthday rewards land at 92% open rate. Personalized challenges build habits — not just transactions.
Loyalty EngineWallet Passes
+38%
Gift card revenue vs prior provider, same brand, same holiday season
How. Branded eGifts that look like your brand, not your vendor's. Wallet pass delivery means the gift never gets lost. Bulk B2B gifting unlocks corporate revenue you weren't capturing.
Gift CardsB2B Gifting
−42%
Discount cost per promoted order, via ML personalization
How. Per-customer discount sensitivity scoring stops your sure-thing buyers from getting 25% off they'd have paid full price for. Wavering carts get the nudge. Loyal buyers get status, not discounts.
PromotionsML Predict
64%
Refund-to-credit conversion across our retail customer base
How. When a customer requests a refund, offer instant store credit + 15%. Most accept. Cash stays in the business, LTV climbs because you said "yes" to credit instead of "wait 5–7 days" to cash.
Store CreditRefunds-as-Credit
Your customer's lifecycle, mapped

From first eGift to lifelong VIP.

Each stage of the retail customer lifecycle has a 99minds product behind it. The same ledger. The same identity. The same brand.

01

Acquisition

A friend sends them a $50 birthday eGift. They open the email, the brand looks beautiful, they redeem. They've never bought from you before — and now they're a customer.

Tactic
Branded eGifts that look like your brand
Pixel-perfect cards, scheduled delivery, included in the wallet on day one. Gifters become your top-of-funnel for free.
Gift CardsWallet Passes
02

First purchase

They redeem the eGift, add a few extras, check out. The cart auto-applies a "first-purchase 15% off" promotion — no code needed, no coupon site to scrape. They feel taken care of.

Tactic
Couponless first-purchase incentive
Customer-bound promotions evaluate at cart time. Right person, right discount, automatic. No code shown.
PromotionsCouponless
03

Retention

Auto-enrolled in loyalty. Earns 200 points on the first order. A wallet pass appears with their tier badge. Three weeks later, a "complete a streak" challenge lands — and they're back.

Tactic
Tiered loyalty + gamified challenges
Status drives repeat. Streaks build habit. Wallet passes keep your brand on their lock screen forever.
Loyalty EngineChallengesWallet Passes
04

The recovery

The wrong size. They request a refund. Instead of cash leaving the business, you offer $57.50 in store credit (the refund + 15%). They accept. They redeem within 30 days.

Tactic
Refunds-as-credit with a sweetener
Embedded in your returns flow. 64% of refunds become store credit. LTV climbs 1.4× for credit-redeeming customers.
Store CreditRefunds-as-Credit
05

VIP & advocacy

Twelve months in, they've hit Gold tier. They get an early-access drop, a private studio tour, and a $25 birthday eGift in their wallet. They send three friends. Each gets a $50 referral eGift.

Tactic
Status, perks & referral flywheel
Tier-protected rewards, partner perks, and a referral program that issues real branded eGifts — not just discount codes.
Loyalty TiersGift CardsReferral

Don't see your tool? Our open API and 60+ webhook events plug into anything. We've shipped custom integrations for over 200 enterprise retail stacks — most go live in a single sprint.
Customer Story

How Lumen & Co made one platform do the work of four.

LUMEN&CO

"We were running Rise.ai for gift cards, Yotpo for loyalty, and a custom Shopify scripts mess for promotions. 99minds replaced all three in seven weeks. Our holiday quarter was the smoothest we've ever had — and our CFO got one invoice instead of three."

MJ
Marcus Johnson
VP of Customer Experience, Lumen & Co
Results in first 12 months
3.1×
Growth in Gold + Platinum loyalty cohort
+38%
Holiday gift card revenue vs prior provider
$1.2M
In refunds converted to store credit
−$340k
Annual vendor spend (vs Rise.ai + Yotpo + custom)
Built for your size, your category

From $5M startups to $500M heritage brands.

Three real customer profiles, three different sizes, three different KPIs. Same platform.

Beauty · DTC
Verdant
$8M GMV · 2 founders, 14 employees

Direct-to-consumer skincare. Heavy first-purchase discount dependency was killing margin. Switched to ML-personalized promotions to cut discount cost without hurting conversion.

Discount cost −42%
Repeat rate +24%
Time to launch 3 weeks
Apparel · Mid-market
Lumen & Co
$48M GMV · 8 stores + ecom

Multi-channel apparel brand. Wanted unified loyalty across in-store and online without a 12-month systems integration. Migrated from three separate vendors in seven weeks.

Vendor spend −$340k/yr
VIP cohort 3.1×
Time to migrate 7 weeks
Home & Heritage
Northwind
$280M GMV · 64 stores + ecom + B2B

Legacy heritage brand. Replaced Blackhawk gift cards and home-grown loyalty with a single 99minds deployment. Refunds-as-credit recovered $1.2M in cash in the first 90 days alone.

Refund-to-credit 64%
Cash retained $1.2M
LTV uplift 1.4×
Switching is easier than you think

Coming from one of these? You're our specialty.

We've migrated hundreds of retail brands off legacy gift card and loyalty stacks. Our migration team handles balance import, parallel running, and customer-facing comms — so the switch is invisible to your end users.

Talk to migrations team →
→

~4 weeks

~6 weeks

~6 weeks
